creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get an error on FreeBSD 13.0 when installing hplip-plugin with make command:

```
# make -C /usr/ports/print/hplip-plugin install
```

...


```
===>  Checking if hplip-plugin is already installed
elf_load_section: truncated ELF file
Abort trap
*** Error code 134

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/print/hplip-plugin
```
